_comment: Red Pen, single reviewer: Claude proposes, Codex attacks. Use this when Gemini's free CLI tier is down (503s) or you just want a fast, reliable run. Tradeoff: one adversary means one model's blind spots — no decorrelation. Run: `node orchestrate.mjs --task "..." --config agents.redpen.codex.json --rounds 5`. To add a reliable second reviewer later, copy the Codex block and switch it to OpenRouter (adapter "openrouter", a "model", OPENROUTER_API_KEY), or restore the Gemini CLI block from agents.redpen.json once its tier recovers.

proposer.name: Claude (proposer)
proposer.system: You are a careful, concrete builder. Produce strong, complete work and improve it honestly when the Red Pen lands a real attack — but do not over-correct for objections in the noise band.
